<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Technical Specification

This is the technical specification for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-2-intelligence-layer/spec.md

## Technical Requirements

### Domain Model Extension

- Extend `ThoughtEntry` with: `IReadOnlyList<string> Tags`, `string Sentiment` (enum values: `"Positive"`, `"Negative"`, `"Neutral"`), `double IntensityScore` (0.0–1.0)
- Existing thoughts without enrichment fields default to `Tags = []`, `Sentiment = "Neutral"`, `IntensityScore = 0.0` when read from storage

### Text Preprocessing Service

- Interface: `ITextPreprocessor` with method `IReadOnlyList<string> Tokenize(string text)`
- Implementation: `TextPreprocessor` — lowercase, remove punctuation, split on whitespace, filter English stop words from a hardcoded list
- Registered as singleton in DI (stateless, no I/O)
- Stop words list stored as a static `HashSet<string>` in the class

### Rule-Based Tagging Engine

- Interface: `ITaggingEngine` with method `IReadOnlyList<string> GetTags(IReadOnlyList<string> tokens)`
- Implementation: `RuleBasedTaggingEngine` — for each domain, check if any token matches the domain's keyword set; return all matched domain names
- Keyword dictionaries loaded from `appsettings.json` under `TaggingEngine:Keywords:{DomainName}` as `string[]`
- Default keyword sets defined in `appsettings.json` for all 7 domains; overridable per environment
- Returns empty list `[]` if no keywords match (thought is untagged)
- Registered as singleton in DI

**Default keyword examples per domain:**
- `Trading`: trade, trading, stock, market, position, portfolio, loss, profit, entry, exit, chart
- `Work`: work, meeting, deadline, project, manager, task, email, report, client, sprint
- `Health`: exercise, sleep, tired, headache, gym, diet, meal, water, pain, sick, doctor
- `Learning`: read, book, course, learn, study, lesson, practice, skill, understand
- `Personal`: family, friend, relationship, weekend, vacation, home, personal
- `Stress`: stress, anxious, overwhelmed, worry, panic, pressure, frustrated, nervous
- `Ideas`: idea, project, build, create, imagine, concept, plan, design, innovate

### Sentiment Analysis Service

- Interface: `ISentimentAnalyzer` with method `SentimentResult Analyze(IReadOnlyList<string> tokens)`
- `SentimentResult`: `string Sentiment`, `double IntensityScore`
- Implementation: `RuleBasedSentimentAnalyzer` — two keyword dictionaries (`positive` and `negative`), each with a weight (0.1–1.0) per keyword
- Score = sum of matched positive weights − sum of matched negative weights
- Sentiment: score > 0.1 → `Positive`; score < -0.1 → `Negative`; else → `Neutral`
- IntensityScore = `Math.Min(1.0, Math.Abs(score))` normalized to [0, 1]
- Keyword weights loaded from `appsettings.json` under `SentimentAnalyzer:PositiveKeywords` and `SentimentAnalyzer:NegativeKeywords`
- Registered as singleton in DI

### Thought Analysis Pipeline

- Interface: `IThoughtAnalysisPipeline` with method `ThoughtAnalysisResult Analyze(string text)`
- `ThoughtAnalysisResult`: `IReadOnlyList<string> Tags`, `string Sentiment`, `double IntensityScore`
- Implementation: `ThoughtAnalysisPipeline` — orchestrates `ITextPreprocessor` → `ITaggingEngine` + `ISentimentAnalyzer` → returns combined result
- Called synchronously within `ThoughtsController.CreateThoughtAsync` before saving the `ThoughtEntry`
- Registered as singleton in DI

### API Changes

- `POST /api/thoughts` response body extended: add `tags`, `sentiment`, `intensityScore` to `ThoughtResponse`
- `GET /api/thoughts` list items extended with same fields
- New endpoint: `GET /api/thoughts/{id}` — returns single thought with full enrichment; 404 if not found or unowned
- `ThoughtsController` updated to accept `IThoughtAnalysisPipeline` dependency

### Storage Changes

- `AzureTableStorageThoughtRepository`: store `Tags` as a pipe-delimited string (`"Stress|Trading"`), `Sentiment` as string, `IntensityScore` as double
- `InMemoryThoughtRepository`: store `Tags`, `Sentiment`, `IntensityScore` directly on the `ThoughtEntry` object
- Backward compatibility: existing entries without these fields deserialize with defaults

### Frontend Changes

- `ThoughtResponse` TypeScript type updated with `tags: string[]`, `sentiment: "Positive" | "Negative" | "Neutral"`, `intensityScore: number`
- `ThoughtCard` updated: render MUI `Chip` for each tag; render colored sentiment badge using MUI `Chip` with color (`success`, `error`, `default`)
- No new API client functions needed — existing `getThoughts` and `createThought` responses now include enrichment data
- New `getThoughtById` function in `frontend/src/api/thoughts.ts` for `GET /api/thoughts/{id}`
